source: docs/boss_tower_counters.md (compiled from game8.co, nexttier.pro, thepalprofessor.com, palworld.fandom.com)

tower_bosses.tactics: Smallest HP pool. Dodge Lightning Claw behind pillars. Ground pals: Gumoss, Rushoar, Fuddler, Direhowl.
Lyleen heals - out-DPS the regen with Fire. Burn/poison heavily reduced vs tower bosses. Watch Poison Fog.
Double weakness. Volcano biome - heat armor. Glass cannon; punish after big casts.
Desert biome - heat armor. Weak to Holy Burst / Hydro Slicer. Phoenix Flare can redirect at you on early recall.
Snow biome - cold armor. Huge hitbox: Beam Slicer / Blast Cannon shine. Uses Ice attacks to punish Dragon pals.
Same Dragon team as Shadowbeak. Run counter-clockwise; dodge Starlight Beam with right roll. Very high attack.
Uses Water attacks to punish Fire pals - avoid Faleris/Jormuntide Ignis. Highest-HP normal tower boss. Grapple + Triple Jump Boots help.
Disable 6 defense modules around Sunreach first. Requires beating Bjorn. Ranged burst.
Typeless - no elemental weakness. ~420k HP, immune phases, wing-charge. Bring Awakened pals + endgame gear. Unlocked via Sealed Calamity questline after all 8 towers. Not catchable.

raid_bosses.notes: Summoning Altar + slab. Drops its own egg (not catchable directly).
Top-tier S-rank pal, obtained via raid egg.
Lv 60 raid, ~1,316,000 HP. Slab fragments from Feybreak dungeons.
Legendary Ocean King (Lv. 70). Summoned with the Echoing Flute (main questline); the summon teleports you to a water arena. No regular wild spawn. (player-reported, 2026-07-16)
raid_bosses.arena: Open sea arena: swimming pal MANDATORY to move; flying mount helps survive the tsunami waves (player-reported, 2026-07-16)
